```ruby
def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size if m > 0 else 0
  count = 0

  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0
        queue = [[i, j]]
        island = [[i, j]]
        sum = grid[i][j]
        while queue.any?
          x, y = queue.pop
          directions = [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]]
          directions.each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              queue << [nx, ny]
              island << [nx, ny]
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
            end
          end
        end
        island.each do |(x, y)|
          grid[x][y] = 0
        end
        count += 1 if sum % k == 0
      end
    end
  end
  count
end
```

def solve(grid, k)
    m = grid.size
    n = grid[0].size
    visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
    count = 0
    # iterate through each cell
    for i in 0...m
        for j in 0...n
            if grid[i][j] > 0 and not visited[i][j]
                # perform BFS
                queue = [(i,j)]
                visited[i][j] = true
                current_sum = 0
                current_sum += grid[i][j]
                while queue.not_empty?
                    x, y = queue.shift
                    # check four directions
                    directions = [[0,1], [1,0], [0,-1], [-1,0]]
                    directions.each do |dx, dy|
                        nx = x + dx
                        ny = y + dy
                        if nx >=0 && nx < m && ny >=0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0
                            visited[nx][ny] = true
                            queue << [nx, ny]
                            current_sum += grid[nx][ny]
                        end
                    end
                end
                # check if current_sum is divisible by k
                if current_sum % k == 0
                    count += 1
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return count
end
